rulings.Case Title: JAMES SHIFFER et al VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant General Electric Companys Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pacific Gas And Electric Companys Compliance With Its Trial And Discovery Subpoenas
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, September 4, 2013 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant General Electric Company¿s motion to compel PG&E¿s compliance with its trial and discovery subpoenas: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:45a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
